creator: sjorge+signup@blackdot.be
text:
Ok that was easy, I was working from /usr/port_svn, looks like port tests will still use /usr/ports even if the port you point it to is in an alternative dir.

leto# port test /usr/ports/sysutils/u-boot-orangepi-zero
===> Using ports tree /usr/ports
===> Validating port with portlint
Makefile: No such file or directory at /usr/local/bin/portlint line 216.
Error validating port

Now getting this error, other u-boot variants show the same error though. Not sure if I messed up somewhere or if it is normal for these type of ports.
